subTopicTitle: Heart of Darkness (Conrad) — Part II — Up-river

items.prompt: Describe Marlow's journey up the Congo River in Part II of 'Heart of Darkness'.
keyPoints: Marlow's anticipation of meeting Kurtz
Challenges faced during the journey, such as mechanical issues
Atmospheric descriptions of the river and jungle

markingCriteria.full: Includes all key points with accurate detail
markingCriteria.partial: Includes 1-2 key points or lacks detail

items.prompt: Identify the symbolic significance of the Congo River in Part II.
keyPoints: Representation of the journey into the subconscious
Symbol of the unknown and mysterious
Contrast between civilization and savagery

markingCriteria.partial: Includes 1-2 key points or lacks detail

items.prompt: What role does the character of the Russian Harlequin play in Part II?
keyPoints: Acts as a devotee of Kurtz
Provides insight into Kurtz's character
Symbolizes blind loyalty and naivety

items.prompt: Imagine Marlow encounters a modern-day environmental activist during his journey. How might this encounter alter his perspective on the exploitation he witnesses?
